news_bbc.title: ITV sells media and entertainment arm to Sky for £1.6bn
news_bbc.summary: The two broadcasters say the deal will create a strong rival to global streaming giants.

news_bbc.title: Three things you can do to stop EU border checks at the airport costing you
news_bbc.summary: Queues are expected at airports this summer owing to EU's new digital border control system.

news_bbc.title: Wegovy weight loss pill now available in UK - here's what you need to know
news_bbc.summary: The once-a-day pill, from the makers of the Wegovy weight-loss jab, can now be bought privately in UK pharmacies.

news_bbc.title: Backlash after China bubble tea firm ordered to pay Louis Vuitton $1.5m
news_bbc.summary: A court in China ruled that Molly Tea had infringed on the luxury brand's four-petal flower design.

news_bbc.title: EasyJet agrees 'in principle' to £5.2bn takeover deal
news_bbc.summary: The low-cost airline had previously rejected four takeover offers from US investment firm Castlelake.

news_bbc.title: What Sky buying ITV could mean for your favourite shows
news_bbc.summary: Sky is set to buy ITV's TV and streaming channels for up to £1.6bn, the companies announced on Monday.

news_bbc.title: 'Start work at 11' - but will other bosses be as flexible over England's 1am match?
news_bbc.summary: Employers are being urged to use their "common sense" to allow staff to work flexibly where they can.

news_bbc.title: No-gift policy for Taylor Swift, but how much should you give at a wedding?
news_bbc.summary: Wedding lists are being replaced by cash requests, but guests are divided over how much to give.
